subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast pilgrimaged to the two Sacred Thresholds, may my soul be a sacrifice unto them both! Render thanks unto God that this ocean voyage hath reached its end [3.5s]... ...the nest of all the Prophets of God
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای زائر دو عتبه مقدسه روحی لهما الفداء حمد کن خدا را که این سفر دریا منتهی
subcodes.subjects: @love and unity, @Zoroastrianism; Mahabad and Zoroaster, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @review of publications
